query: Want to know about rehabilitation therapy
answer:
| Benefit | Service | In-Network | Out-of-Network | Limitations |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Rehabilitation Therapy | Office and clinic visits | $40 copay per visit, deductible waived | Deductible, then 40% coinsurance | Data Not Found |
| Rehabilitation Therapy | Other outpatient services | Deductible, then 20% coinsurance | Deductible, then 40% coinsurance | Data Not Found |
| Rehabilitation Therapy | Inpatient Care | Deductible, then 20% coinsurance | Deductible, then 40% coinsurance | Data Not Found |
source: Premera Employees Health Plan – Standard PPO Retiree Plan
